headline: Trump Warns Republicans Of 'Unrecoverable Death Wish' Over Save America Act
summary: President Donald Trump has warned that failing to pass the Save America Act would produce what he called the worst outcome for a political party in U.S. senate history, and he labeled it an "Unrecoverable Death Wish!!!" for that party.

headline: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Revealed That This Teenage Obsession Prepped Him In Life For The 'Ultimate' Game — Entrepreneurship
summary: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong described how his early obsession with strategy video games shaped his entrepreneurial mindset and business strategy.

headline: ServiceNow CEO Says AI Fear Is Missing Real Story: Customers Are Spending More
summary: ServiceNow says AI is boosting demand and productivity, not cutting jobs, as enterprise spending accelerates.

headline: Kevin O'Leary Slams Mamdani's Pied-à-Terre Tax: 'Really Stupid'
summary: Kevin OLeary has blasted New York City's proposed pied-à-terre tax as "really stupid," arguing that owners of luxury second homes bankroll construction work, keep paying ongoing property-related costs, and don't strain city services when they're absent.

headline: Mark Cuban Slams Healthcare Profits, Calls For Shift From Insurers To Consumers
summary: Mark Cuban has blasted the health insurance industry, arguing that many big players behave less like risk managers and more like financial entities that profit from gaps in how healthcare contracts get enforced.

headline: Ross Gerber Says Tesla Faces Potential SpaceX Merger As Investors Question Strategic Direction, 'It Will All Be Wrapped Up As One Ball of Elon'
summary: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber has suggested that SpaceX could end up stepping in to support Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) in a deal that gets labeled a merger rather than a straight takeover.

headline: Trump Cancels Pakistan Talks: 'We Have All The Cards, They Have None!'
summary: On Saturday, President Donald Trump said he called off a planned trip by his representatives to Islamabad, Pakistan, where they were set to meet with Iranian officials, arguing the travel would waste time and pointing to disarray inside Tehran's leadership.

headline: Shiba Inu Burns Spike 673%, But This Dogecoin Resistance Is An Even Bigger Story

headline: Scaramucci's 'Biggest Investing Mistake Has Always Been Selling Too Early'
summary: Anthony Scaramucci has argued that his costliest habit in markets has been exiting positions too soon, and urged investors to stick with a simple plan: buy an S&P 500 index fund and hold it for decades.

headline: Elon Musk Slams SPLC: 'Stoking Hate Was Incredibly Lucrative'
summary: On Saturday, Elon Musk used a series of posts on X to argue that nonprofit watchdogs can have financial motives to keep social conflict in the spotlight.

headline: Trump's Million-Dollar Gold Card Visa Has Just One Taker So Far
summary: President Trump's gold card visa initiative has produced just one approved applicant, even though the White House has pitched the pay-to-reside plan as a major revenue and investment draw.

headline: Steve Jobs Called This Former Apple CEO A 'Bozo' But The Executive Proved An Important Point That Stuck With Him
summary: Steve Jobs believed this former CEO's leadership failed at Apple, but it highlighted the importance of a strong leader and focused strategy.

headline: China's BYD Says US Not Needed As EV Demand Surges
summary: BYD says it is expanding globally without the U.S., as rising fuel costs boost EV demand and strain its production capacity.

headline: Trump Calls Off Talks: 'They Can Call Us Any Time They Want'
summary: President Trump told Fox News on Saturday that envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer be heading to Pakistan for talks with Iran.

headline: Pony AI Advances L4 Ambitions With Nvidia-Based Autonomous Driving Controller
summary: Pony AI Inc. shares edged higher after unveiling a next-gen Nvidia-powered L4 autonomous driving controller, signaling continued tech progress despite mixed momentum signals.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: UnitedHealth, Capital One, Lululemon — And Markets Extend Rally
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Goldman Sachs Analyst Says Cybersecurity Stocks Are Outpacing Broader Software Sector— 'Set A Good Bar'
summary: Goldman Sachs says U.S. cybersecurity stocks trade at a 24% premium to software peers, highlighting strong AI readiness, M&A strategy and durable industry moats.

headline: Gary Vaynerchuk Says 'Every Brand On Earth' Should Be Doing This— Or Risk Wasting 93 Cents Of Every Marketing Dollar Spent
summary: Gary Vaynerchuk warns Fortune 500 brands are overspending on outdated marketing tactics, urging a shift toward mid-funnel strategies and organic social media content.

headline: Anthony Scaramucci Tells Democrats To Stop Saying Trump's Name: 'You've Already Lost Half The Room'
summary: Scaramucci warned that Democrats risk alienating voters by attacking Trump and should instead focus on economic issues.

headline: Musk's OpenAI Feud Intensifies As Court Dismisses Fraud Charges But Clears Path For High-Stakes Trial Over Non-Profit Shift
summary: A U.S. judge dismissed Elon Musk's fraud claims against OpenAI but allowed key allegations over its shift to a for-profit model.

headline: Powell DOJ Probe Put On Hold, Not Closed, Say Elizabeth Warren And Dick Durbin: 'Leaves The Door Wide Open For...'
summary: Democratic senators warned that the Justice Department's paused probe into Jerome Powell could be revived at any time.

headline: Google May Pour Up To $40 Billion Into Anthropic As AI Compute Demand Booms
summary: Google may invest upto $40 billion in Anthropic as demand for AI computing surges and strategic ties between the companies deepen.

headline: Peter Thiel Buys $12 Million Mansion In Argentina As Javier Milei Woos Silicon Valley: Report
summary: PayPal co-founder Peter Thiel buys a $12 million estate in Buenos Aires' Palermo Chico, setting a new price record in the Barrio Parque market and signaling broader investment interest.

summary: China's DeepSeek launched its V4 model powered by Huawei chips, signaling a shift away from Nvidia as it pushes AI self-reliance.

summary: Nvidia surged past a $5 trillion valuation as AI-driven demand and strong Intel earnings fueled a broad semiconductor rally.

headline: Strait Of Hormuz May Stay Shut Until Second Half Of 2026 Amid Middle East, Baker Hughes CFO Says
summary: Baker Hughes Co. says the Strait of Hormuz may stay closed until late this year, as geopolitical risks tighten global oil and LNG supply despite strong Q1 earnings.

headline: Trump Envoys Jared Kushner, Steve Witkoff Head To Pakistan For Iran Talks— Tehran Denies Any Meeting
